arts.ttl: After England snub: Grealish tells Tuchel he wants OUT of Man City
arts.sum: Jack Grealish is frustrated with his bit-part role at Manchester City, according to England boss Thomas Tuchel. England boss Thomas Tuchel has now revealed that he would have loved to call up Grealish but that he simply couldn't justify his inclusion due to his lack of 'rhythm.'

arts.ttl: Where Matt O'Riley stands at Brighton as Celtic hero finds crucial champion amid season of injury setbacks
arts.sum: It has been a torrid campaign for O'Riley and his is set to miss the Premier League clash with Manchester City

arts.ttl: Marmoush returns as City make four changes
arts.sum: CITY : Ortega, Lewis, Khusanov, Dias (C), Gvardiol, Nico, Gundogan, Savinho, Marmoush, Doku, Haaland City have lost nine Premier League games this season, the joint-most league defeats that Pep Guardiola has suffered in a campaign in his managerial career (also 9 in 2019-20).

arts.ttl: Ruben Dias suggests what could be the reason behind Man City's dismal season - but insists new signings are 'starving' to win back the title
arts.sum: Pep Guardiola's side have endured a difficult campaign and are currently fighting for a top-four spot having won an unprecedented fourth consecutive title last season.

arts.sum: Manchester City host Brighton in the Premier League knowing victory will strengthen their Champions League qualification hopes.

arts.ttl: Jack Grealish frustrations with Pep Guardiola revealed by Thomas Tuchel
arts.sum: England manager Thomas Tuchel revealed Jack Grealish's frustrations with the inconsistent opportunities Pep Guardiola has afforded him at Manchester City.
